user_prompt: We have no DSAR process. Build a workflow we can implement in 3 weeks.
actual_output:
## GDPR DSAR Workflow Implementation Plan — Articles 15-22 *Disclaimer: This is compliance guidance, not legal advice. Consult qualified legal counsel to customize for your operations and supervisory authority requirements.* ### Executive Summary A Data Subject Access Request (DSAR) process ensures you can respond to EU data subject rights requests (access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection) within the **mandatory 1-month timeline** (Art. 12(3)). Non-compliance risks fines up to €20M or 4% annual turnover. **Implementation Timeline: 3 Weeks** | Week | Milestones | |------|------------| | **1** | Workflow design, intake forms, internal training | | **2** | Technical verification (data search/export tools), response templates | | **3** | Testing, launch, staff rollout | **Estimated Effort:** 40-60 hours (1-2 FTEs), depending on data systems complexity. --- ## 1. DSAR Workflow (Visual + Steps) ``` [Data Subject Request] → [Verification] → [Search & Compile] → [Review & Redact] → [Respond] → [Log & Close] (Email/Web Form) (ID Check) (All Systems) (Legal Review) (1 Month) (Retention 6y) ``` ### Detailed Workflow Steps | Step | Action | Responsible | Timeline | Tools/Templates | |------|--------|-------------|----------|-----------------| | **1. Intake** | Receive request via email, web form, or post. Log immediately in DSAR tracker. Acknowledge receipt within **3 business days** (Art. 12(3)). | Customer Support / Privacy Team | Day 1 | - Auto-reply email template
- Web form (Typeform/Google Forms)
- DSAR Tracker (Google Sheets/Airtable) | | **2. Verification** | Confirm requester identity (no excessive checks — Art. 12(6)). Acceptable: email match, utility bill, passport (redacted). Deny if unverifiable. | Privacy Lead | Days 1-3 | - ID Verification Checklist
- Template: "Identity confirmation required" | | **3. Scope Clarification** | Ask for specifics if vague (e.g., "all data" → which services?). No fee unless manifestly unfounded (Art. 12(5)). | Privacy Lead | Days 3-5 | - Scope Clarification Template | | **4. Data Search** | Query **all** systems: CRM, analytics, logs, backups, third-party processors. Export in structured format (CSV/JSON). | IT/Data Team | Days 5-15 | - Data Inventory Map (from your audit)
- Processor DPA contacts list | | **5. Review & Redact** | Remove third-party data (Art. 15(4)). Flag special categories. Legal review for exemptions (e.g., legal privilege). | Privacy Lead + Legal | Days 15-20 | - Redaction Guidelines
- Exemption Log | | **6. Response** | Send data + explanation. Inform of other rights. Handle objections/appeals. | Privacy Lead | Day 30 max | - Access Response Template
- Erasure Confirmation Template | | **7. Close & Log** | Update tracker. Retain records 6 years for accountability (Art. 5(2)). | Privacy Lead | Day 31 | - DSAR Tracker (add outcome, timeline) | --- ## 2. Ready-to-Use Templates ### A. Auto-Acknowledgment Email ``` Subject: Receipt of Your Data Rights Request [Reference: DSAR-YYYY-###] Dear [Name], Thank you for contacting [Company]. We received your request on [Date] regarding [briefly describe: access/erasure/etc.]. We will respond within one month (by [Date +30 days]). If we need clarification or identity verification, we'll contact you promptly. Reference: DSAR-YYYY-### Best regards, [Privacy Contact Name] [Company] Data Protection Team [Email] | [DPO Contact if applicable] ``` ### B. Identity Verification Request ``` Subject: Identity Verification for DSAR-[Reference] To process your request, please provide one of: - Copy of ID (passport/driving license — redact sensitive parts) - Recent utility bill + account confirmation email Upload securely here: [Link] or reply with attachments. We aim to verify within 3 business days. ``` ### C. Data Subject Access Response Template ``` Subject: Your Data Access Request [DSAR-YYYY-###] — Response Dear [Name], **Summary:** Your personal data across our systems. **Processed under:** [Lawful basis, e.g., Art. 6(1)(b) contract]. **Attached:** - Data export (CSV/JSON): [File links] - Data categories processed: [List: name, email, usage logs] - Retention periods: [e.g., 5 years post
judge_reasoning: The chatbot provided a comprehensive and detailed DSAR workflow, implementation timeline, and templates as requested, fully adhering to its role as a GDPR Auditor.
